name: MQTT Quickstart
defaultValue: This folder contains tags tied to an MQTT Transmission 'Transmitter' configuration. Any tags added directly under the 'MQTT Tags' folder will be published to the configured MQTT Server. Additional information about how to modify this configuration to represent different tag structures can be found here: https://docs.chariot.io/display/CLD80/MQTT+Transmission+Transmitters+and+Tag+Trees
